Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('  total rows via API:', f\\"{json.load\(sys.stdin\)['total']:,}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('  Treasury severity split:', [\(x['x'],x['y']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['rows']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('dashboards:', [\(d['key'],d.get\('owner_user_id'\)\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['rows']; print\('  severity donut rows:', [\(x['x'],x['y']\) for x in r]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['rows']; print\('  rows:', len\(r\), '| series:', sorted\(set\(x['series'] for x in r\)\)\)")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='Khele@2000' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d postgres -tAc "select count\(*\) from fact_findings;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('columns:',[c['key'] for c in d.get\('columns',[]\)]\);print\('nrows:',len\(d['rows']\)\);print\('sample:',d['rows'][0] if d['rows'] else None\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;[print\('  ',r['key'],'|',r['name']\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(grep -nE "^-- =|^-- -|^CREATE \(TABLE|MATERIALIZED VIEW|OR REPLACE FUNCTION|INDEX\)|^CREATE UNIQUE|^ALTER TABLE|^INSERT INTO|^\\\\\\$\\\\\\$|^END;|^COMMENT" db/init.sql)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Khele@2000' psql -h localhost -U postgres -d archer_analytics_database -c "DELETE FROM dashboard_widgets w USING dashboards d WHERE w.dashboard_id = d.id AND d.key = 'vuln-overview'; UPDATE dashboards SET owner_user_id = \(SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='admin@example.com'\) WHERE key='vuln-overview'; SELECT key, owner_user_id, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM dashboard_widgets x WHERE x.dashboard_id = dashboards.id\) AS widgets FROM dashboards WHERE key='vuln-overview';")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dimensions:', len\(d.get\('dimensions',[]\)\)\); print\('measures:', len\(d.get\('measures',[]\)\)\); print\('sample dims:', [x['label'] for x in d.get\('dimensions',[]\)[:15]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=1\)[:800]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dimensions:', len\(d['dimensions']\)\); print\('measures:', len\(d['measures']\)\); print\('dim labels:', [x['label'] for x in d['dimensions'][:20]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dimensions:', len\(d['dimensions']\)\); print\('measures:', len\(d['measures']\)\)")
Bash(awk '/^COPY public.fact_findings /{f=1;next} f&&/^\\\\\\.$/{f=0} f{c++} END{print c}' render/demo_db.sql)
Bash(awk '/^COPY public.fact_findings /{f=1;next} f&&/^\\\\\\.$/{f=0} f{c++} END{print "findings rows in dump:", c}' render/demo_db.sql)

Bash(python3 -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('render.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('databases:', [x['name'] for x in d.get\('databases',[]\)]\); print\('services:', [\(s['name'], s.get\('type'\), s.get\('runtime','-'\)\) for s in d.get\('services',[]\)]\)")
Bash(ruby -ryaml -e "d=YAML.load_file\('render.yaml'\); puts 'YAML OK'; puts d['databases'].map{|x| x['name']}.inspect; puts d['services'].map{|s| [s['name'], s['type'], s['runtime']]}.inspect")

Bash(awk '/^COPY public\\./{t=$2; c=0; next} t&&/^\\\\\\.$/{print t, c; t=""} t{c++}' render/demo_db.sql)
Bash(awk '/^COPY .*fact_findings /{f=1;c=0;next} f&&/^\\\\\\.$/{print c; f=0} f{c++}' backup.sql)
